items.title: Review and listening
items.body:
Final practice for this workbook lesson. Listen, repeat, and review vocabulary.

Examples:
• Do you speak Portuguese at home?
• Do you work in the morning?
• 2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.
• 8. Do you eat bread and cheese at school? cheese ham / bread ham.
• 11. Do you study your English lessons alone? / French / Portuguese

items.text: Do you speak Portuguese at home?
Do you work in the morning?
2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.
8. Do you eat bread and cheese at school? cheese ham / bread ham.
11. Do you study your English lessons alone? / French / Portuguese

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: Do you speak Portuguese at home?

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: Do you work in the morning?

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: 2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.
